revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:甲塚古墳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:甲塚古墳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:甲塚古墳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:甲塚古墳]]
'''Kabutozuka Kofun''' (甲塚古墳)
== Kabutozuka Kofun (甲塚古墳) ==
* {{ill|Kabutozuka Kofun (Iwaki)|en|Kabutozuka Kofun (Iwaki)|qid=Q17990175|lt=Kabutozuka Kofun (Iwaki)|1=Kabutozuka Kofun (Iwaki)}} - An ancient Kofun in Iwaki City, Fukushima Prefecture, designated as a national historic site. * {{ill|Kabutozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|甲塚古墳 (下野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kabutozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|qq=}} - An ancient Kofun in Shimotsuke City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Kabutozuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|甲塚古墳 (京都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kabutozuka Kofun (Kyoto)|qq=}} - An ancient Kofun in Kyoto City, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Kabutozuka Kofun (Ikaruga)|ja|甲塚古墳 (斑鳩町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kabutozuka Kofun (Ikaruga)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - An ancient Kofun in Ikaruga Town, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Hikodoku Kabutozuka Kofun|ja|彦徳甲塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikodoku Kabutozuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - An ancient Kofun in Miyako Town, Fukuoka Prefecture, designated as a Fukuoka Prefectural Historic Site. * {{ill|Kabutozuka Square Mound|ja|甲塚方墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kabutozuka Square Mound|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - An ancient Kofun in Miyako Town, Fukuoka Prefecture, designated as a Miyako Town Historic Site.
== {{ill|Kabutozuka Kofun|ja|兜塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kabutozuka Kofun|qq=}} (兜塚古墳) == '''Kabutozuka Kofun''' (兜塚古墳)
* {{ill|Kabutozuka Kofun (Sendai)|ja|兜塚古墳 (仙台市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kabutozuka Kofun (Sendai)|qq=}} - A kofun (ancient Kofun) located in Sendai City, Miyagi Prefecture. * Kabutozuka Kofun (Komae) - A kofun located in Komae City, Tokyo. Designated as a historic site by Tokyo. See {{ill|Komae Kofun Group|ja|狛江古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komae Kofun Group|1=Komae Kofun Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q111804227}} for reference. * {{ill|Kabutozuka Kofun (Yokohama)|ja|兜塚古墳 (横浜市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kabutozuka Kofun (Yokohama)|qq=}} - A kofun that once existed in Yokohama City, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Kabutozuka Kofun (Sakurai)|ja|兜塚古墳 (桜井市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kabutozuka Kofun (Sakurai)|qq=}} - A kofun located in Sakurai City, Nara Prefecture. Designated as a historic site by Sakurai City. * Kabutozuka Kofun (Fukuoka) - A kofun located in Fukuoka City, Fukuoka Prefecture. Designated as a National [[:en:Historic Sites of Japan|Historic Site]]. See {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Group|ja|今宿古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Kofun Group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579222|1=Q135579222}} for reference.
== See Also == * {{ill|Kabutoyama Kofun|ja|兜山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kabutoyama Kofun|1=Q17502989|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17502989}}
